svg.title: OPG class diagram (implemented v0.1)
svg.desc: UML class diagram reflecting the implemented v0.1 orchestrator core plus the gate-node foundation after Design Review 1, v1.2 review, v1.3 fixes, and the ITEM 7 note-field rollback. Five logical zones: state and audit, graph types, graph runner and outcomes, checkpoint, config and model client. Green-tinted classes and members are added since v0.
svg.text: Reflects code after Design Review 1, v1.2 review, v1.3 fixes, and the v1.3 ITEM 7 note-field rollback. Green-shaded items were added since v0.
Node, GateNode, Edge, and GuardSlot are composed into Graph
— run() returns one of five outcomes; resume() returns one of Completed / Rejected / Error
For cross-zone relationships: GraphRunner uses Graph, OperatorConfig, AuditLog, and CheckpointStore. Checkpoint contains a RunState snapshot.
